title: AwardsWatch - FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: MAKEUP and HAIRSTYLING
text: According to Erik Anderson's final predictions for the 98th Academy Awards (March 15, 2026), Frankenstein (Netflix) Mike Hill, Jordan Samuel and Cliona Furey is the predicted winner with victories at BAFTA, CCA, and MUAH awards. Sinners (Warner Bros) with Ken Diaz, Mike Fontaine, and Shunika Terry earned multiple MUAH awards and BAFTA/CCA nominations as a strong contender. Additional nominees include Kokuho (GKIDS), The Smashing Machine (A24), and The Ugly Stepsister (Independent Film Company/Shudder). Anderson notes he is keeping an eye out for Sinners as a potential upset, despite Frankenstein's dominant awards season performance across major precursor ceremonies.
